intents.text: Git push/pull or sync the repository.
Document the new command line flag in the --help text.
Add a short option for the new flag.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: Give it a short option as well

intents.text: Use -A as the short option; -a should be equivalent to --all.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: `-A`, most likely. `-a` should be equivalent to `--all`

intents.text: Commit and push only after all work is complete.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: Commit and push when you are done
